title: Title
languageToPublish: Please select in which language(s) you wish to submit this record:
jurisdictionImplementationNational: If you selected National above, please provide any additional information related to the implementation of the Protocol
jurisdictionImplementationSubNational: If you selected Subnational or Community above, please indicate to how the selected jurisdiction’s application differs from the national application of the of the Protocol.
establishedMeasure: Has your country established legislative, administrative or policy measures on ABS? {establishedMeasuresInclude}
establishedMeasuresInclude: This includes measures on access, benefit-sharing and compliance.
agrSubjectToPic: Is access to {geneticResources} subject to prior informed consent?
agrMeasureForAccess: Are measures in place related to access to {geneticResources}?
argPermitRequired: Is an ABS permit required for {type} utilization of {geneticResources}?
benefitSharing: Measures on fair and equitable benefit-sharing
yesAllMeasures: Yes, all measures are in place
tkSubjectToPic: Is access to {traditionalKnowledge} subject to prior informed consent?
developmentAndImplementationNonCommercia: In the development and implementation of its ABS legislation or regulatory requirements, has your country created conditions to promote and encourage research which contributes to the conservation and sustainable use of biodiversity including through simplified measures on access for non-commercial research purposes?
developmentAndImplementationHealth: In the development and implementation of its ABS legislation or regulatory requirements, has your country paid due regard to cases of present or imminent emergencies that threaten or damage human, animal or plant health?
developmentAndImplementationFoodSecurity: In the development and implementation of its ABS legislation or regulatory requirements, has your country considered the importance of genetic resources for food and agriculture and their special role for food security?
developmentAndImplementationTreatment: In such cases, has your country considered the need for expeditious access to genetic resources and expeditious fair and equitable sharing, including access to affordable treatments by those in need?
indigenousPeoples: Are there indigenous peoples and local communities in your country?
ipclsNonCommercialAccess: Is an ABS permit required for non-commercial utilization of genetic resources held by IPLCs?
ipclsGeneticResourcesPermit: Is an ABS permit required for commercial utilization of genetic resources held by IPLCs?
traditionalKnowledgeMeasuresTaken: Has your country taken measures with the aim of ensuring that traditional knowledge associated with genetic resources that is held by indigenous peoples and local communities within your country is accessed with their prior informed consent, or their approval and involvement, and that mutually agreed terms have been established?
measuresOnCompliance: Measures on compliance with domestic legislation or regulatory requirements on ABS and monitoring the utilization of genetic resources
noCountryDetermined: No, my country has determined that access to its genetic resources is not subject to prior informed consent
knowledgeAccess: Access to traditional knowledge associated with genetic resources
tkMeasureForAccess: Are ABS measures in place related to access to {traditionalKnowledge}?
traditionalKnowledge: traditional knowledge associated with genetic resources
tkPermitRequired: Is an ABS permit required for {type} utilization of {traditionalKnowledge}?
indigenousPeoplesRights: Do indigenous peoples and local communities have the established right to grant access to genetic resources according to your country’s domestic law?
ipclsInformedConsent: Does your country have measures in place with the aim of ensuring that the prior informed consent or approval and involvement of indigenous peoples and local communities is obtained for access to genetic resources?
jurisdictionImplementationDetails: 3. Please provide additional details on the application and implementation for the jurisdiction selected.
measuresProvidedOtherParties: Has your country taken appropriate, effective and proportionate measures to provide that genetic resources utilized within its jurisdiction have been accessed in accordance with prior informed consent and that mutually agreed terms have been established as required by the domestic ABS legislation or regulatory requirements of other Parties?
measuresProvidedOtherIpcls: Has your country taken appropriate, effective and proportionate measures to provide that traditional knowledge associated with genetic resources utilized within its jurisdiction has been accessed with the prior informed consent or approval and involvement of indigenous peoples and local communities and that mutually agreed terms have been established in accordance with the domestic requirements of the Party where such indigenous peoples and local communities are located?
article17InformationRequired: Does your country require users of genetic resources to provide the information referred to in Article 17.1 (a)(i) to its designated checkpoint/s?
article53Implemented: Does your country have measures in place requiring that benefits from the utilization of genetic resources, as well as subsequent applications and commercialization, be shared with the Party providing such resources?
article55Implemented: Has your country taken measures in order that benefits arising from the utilization of traditional knowledge associated with genetic resources are shared with indigenous peoples and local communities holding such knowledge?
additionalImportantInfo: Any additional important information that can be helpful to understand your country’s particular circumstances related to the implementation of the Protocol.
notesInfos: The “Notes” field is for personal reference and can be seen only when the record is being edited. It will be hidden once the record is published. This field is not meant to be used for confidential information.
